queries.q: Build a Jobs to be Done canvas for freelancers using our invoicing product
Our personas feel like demographic cardboard; I want to understand what customers are actually trying to accomplish when they hire us
queries.notes: Intent-only ask; personas too surface-level is a listed use case

queries.q: Map the functional, emotional, and social dimensions of the job our meal-kit subscribers are hiring us for
Customers keep switching from spreadsheets to our tool and I want to capture the underlying progress they're seeking
We're repositioning the product around customer progress instead of features; create the JTBD canvas to anchor that work
Use the interview synthesis we finished last week to build a jobs-to-be-done canvas for the onboarding segment
Create a JTBD canvas for small-business owners managing payroll
Marketing wants messaging that resonates; help me articulate the job, the struggle, and the emotional stakes our buyers experience
Why do customers fire their current analytics tool and hire ours? Frame it with the jobs framework
Capture the circumstances, motivations, and desired outcomes behind why teams adopt our API product
Design needs a person-shaped artifact with goals, behaviors, and quotes for the new dashboard work; build that profile
queries.notes: Person-shaped artifact for design belongs to the persona skill, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: I have 15 raw customer interview transcripts; pull out the patterns and insights first
queries.notes: Raw research must be synthesized before a canvas, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Frame the cart-abandonment problem as a one-page problem statement for the team
queries.notes: Framing one specific problem; define-problem-statement territory

queries.q: Build an opportunity solution tree connecting our retention goal to customer opportunities
Compare our positioning against the top four competitors in a structured analysis
Write the PRD for the job-board feature we committed to last quarter
queries.notes: Contains 'job' but is a specification ask

queries.q: My Docker container can't reach the host database; help me debug the networking
Write a SQL window function that ranks customers by lifetime value
Arrange travel for three days of customer visits in Toronto
Draft this quarter's OKRs for the growth team
